title: New Studio Calico Online Class || 25 Days
excerpt: Excited to be a part of 25 Days ! **Once the class kits sell out, registration for this class will remain open - those students will receive access to the printables and cut files, but willnot receive the bonus kit.…
body:
Excited to be a part of 25 Days!

**Once the class kits sell out, registration for this class will remain open - those students will receive access to the printables and cut files, but willnot receive the bonus kit. Sorry, bonus kits are sold out**

I got the bonus kit in the mail yesterday and it is CUTE. I know it's only November 1st, but I am already excited for December. For more details on 25 Days, or to sign up, click here (or on any of the photos above).
